license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfyijpue
title: Carbonate-Bicarbonate Buffer
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH range: pH 9.2 to pH 10.6 (a) 0.1 M Sodium carbonate (anhydrous), 10.6 g L -1 (M.W.: 106.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Sodium bicarbonate, 8.4 g L -1 (M.W.: 84.0 g mol -1 ) Mix sodium carbonate and sodium bicarbonate solutions in the proportions indicated. %s %s
Adjust the final volume to 200 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter.
